column2: Banana ice Nic Salt by Vortex Bar Series
column3:
Banana ice Nic Salt by Vortex Bar Series delivers a smooth, ripe banana flavour layered with a crisp icy finish for a refreshing all-day vape. The natural sweetness of banana is perfectly balanced by a cool exhale, creating a flavour that is both creamy and revitalising.

Vortex Bar Series Nic Salt e-liquids are formulated to provide a lighter throat hit, even at higher nicotine strengths. Available in 10mg and 20mg, Banana Ice is ideal for users seeking fast nicotine satisfaction with a smooth inhale.

Blended at a 50/50 VG/PG ratio, Vortex Bar Series e-liquids are designed for MTL (Mouth To Lung) vape kits and pods. This blend produces discreet vapour levels while closely replicating the feel of a traditional cigarette.

Inspired by flavours found in popular prefilled pod kits, Vortex Bar Series offers premium taste in convenient 10ml bottles, giving you more value without compromising on quality.

Banana Ice Nic Salt by Vortex Bar Series

  • 10ml Nic Salt E-Liquid
  • 10mg or 20mg Nicotine Strength
  • 50% VG / 50% PG
  • Designed for MTL Vape Kits
  • Made in the UK
  • Recyclable Bottle
  • Childproof Cap
  • Tamper Evident Seal
